title: Natural & Social Science in the Executive Branch
summary: John P. Holdren won the 2018 Daniel Patrick Moynihan Prize. He delivered the annual Moynihan Lecture on May 17, 2018, at the Willard Intercontinental Hotel in Washington, D.C.
body: What Happened Under Obama? What's Happening Under Trump? Note John P. Holdren won the 2018 Daniel Patrick Moynihan Prize, which is awarded by the American Academy of Political and Social Science . He delivered the annual Moynihan Lecture on May 17, 2018, at the Willard Intercontinental Hotel in Washington, D.C. The latest from Belfer See more " Obama’s Science Adviser Blasts Trump Policies and Personnel ," a news story about Professor Holdren's speech by Randy Showstack, was published by Earth and Space Science News on May 30, 2018.
